heroQuote: “How would you feel, if your perception of reality was altered, forever?”
artistBio:
About the Artist

I can't exactly remember when the strange dreams started. I remember reading somewhere to record these dreams, instead of simply shaking them off. Exodus, is the first novel exploring these dreams, its part of a trilogy of stories and music.

It begins while Conner is working as a reporter of the strange, investigating strange incidents across America. Along his journey he meets a stranger who changes his life forever. He no longer reports on the strange, he becomes strange.

Like when someone has a tune in their head and passes it on to you, I'm passing my dreams on. I hope you enjoy this debut novel.
comingSoon:
Coming Soon

The adventure of Conner Gideon continues into the world of the strange . From growing up in different countries and cultures around the world, to exploring strange new worlds and realities.

Along the way he discovers things about himself and others, people he thought he knew, and how we are all connected across this planet, this reality and our relationship with other realities .

Check for the Latest Updates from time to time or follow talesofgideon on Instagram as I will announce when the EPUB is released for purchase. Thank you for your support
newBookSynopsis:
Exodus is a science fiction novel that follows Conner Gideon, son of an American Airforce officer, who, probably because of his fathers work, becomes facinated at an early age in unidentified flying objects (UFO's) and unexplainable incidents.

His journey, unlike his father’s follows a path that would lead him to reporting strange incidences across America including UFO's, interviewing hundreds of witnesses and asking himself the unanswerable question.

With help from his computer genius friend AJ, he tries to answer this question, which ultimately leads to Conner questioning his own reality.

If you were Conner Gideon, how would you feel, if your perception of reality was altered, forever?

microBlog.text: Exodus is nearing release! Here is the second sample of Chapter One, one of many, with audio, hope you enjoy it.
Exodus is nearing release! Here is the first sample of Chapter One, one of many, with audio, hope you enjoy it.
microBlog.fullContent:
Sometimes I think how did I get here? The fearless, investigative journalist Conner Gideon, well more investigator back then. Examining scientific mysteries at school and later college probably creating a few of them along the way. “It’s that Gideon boy again”, was a phrase I heard more than once.

Humble beginnings led my inquisitive mind to the mysteries of science, the world and the universe. Why do so many great men of science with incredible minds form so many different, sometimes polar opposite, opinions? Could they separate accepted myth from fact? How did their stories, their truth, evolve? Somewhere between the threads of these many stories lies the truth, or at least a version of it.
